notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens singles on a line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Trevor Larnach scores. Josh Bell to 3rd. Kody Clemens to 2nd. Kody Clemens advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by right fielder Wilyer Abreu.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens singles on a line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Trevor Larnach scores. Josh Bell to 3rd. Kody Clemens to 2nd. Kody Clemens advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by right fielder Wilyer Abreu.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida grounds into a double play, third baseman Brooks Lee to shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Kody Clemens. Willson Contreras out at 2nd. Masataka Yoshida out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Gasper pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Gasper called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela singles on a ground ball to third baseman Brooks Lee. Ceddanne Rafaela to 2nd. Ceddanne Rafaela advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Brooks Lee.

notableEvents.label: Victor Caratini GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Victor Caratini grounds into a double play, shortstop Marcelo Mayer to second baseman Nick Sogard to first baseman Willson Contreras. Trevor Larnach scores. Josh Bell to 3rd. Kody Clemens out at 2nd. Victor Caratini out at 1st.
